title: Exorcism doubles attack damage to Demon targets

card.rawText: All creatures inflict 2x Atk damage to Demon-type creatures, or creatures with "Demon" in their name on the field.

effect.target: Demon-type creatures or creatures with Demon in name

plan.title: Exorcism doubles attack damage to Demon targets
plan.summary: With Exorcism active as field magic, a creature attacking a Demon-type target deals 2x attack damage.

notes: Pre-place Exorcism in an active field magic slot.
Use Forest Demon as player_2 primary Demon target.
Ensure not in first turn cycle.

steps: Player 1 attacks Forest Demon while Exorcism is field-active.
Inspect damage event multiplier and defender HP loss.

expectedAssertions.label: Demon target took doubled attack damage

manualVerification: Confirm name-containing Demon targets and non-Demon targets in separate variants.
riskNotes: This mirrors the Holy Water field-aura route with a Demon target predicate.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Exorcism's Demon damage multiplier aura.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
